pr.title: Record: Int6 STE + SmearGate + Seq2048 + OrthoInit + RoPE50K + SWA/100 (mean val_bpb=1.1507)

output.summary: Combines Int6 STE quant-aware training with NorMuon optimization, SmearGate/U-Net context gating, RoPE50K, and frequent SWA in a 9-layer 16MB model.
techniques: Int6 STE quantization-aware training with FP16 tied embeddings
NorMuon optimizer with SWA/100 warmdown averaging
SmearGate/U-Net skip gating plus RoPE50K for 2048-context
